title: Number of points of certain Artin-Schreier curves
abstract: We prove a conjecture of Johansen, Helleseth and Kholosha concerning equality of exponential sums related to the cross-correlation of $m$-sequences. In the proof we show that certain Artin-Schreier curves have the same number of points over finite fields. This has a consequence regarding the L-polynomials of these curves.
